task: OpenAI DevDay learning path and workbook funnel
surface: frankx.ai learning, guide, resources, downloads, and lead magnet pages
audience: Creators, AI architects, operators, and founders choosing the current OpenAI builder surface

direction.avoid: Fake product UI, inflated claims, abstract decorative filler, stale Agent Builder guidance
direction.signature: FrankX dark intelligence surface with emerald/cyan emphasis and artifact-led conversion
direction.system: Learning path, AEO guide, lead magnet resource page, downloadable Markdown pack, sitemap wiring

asset_quality.why_premium: The premium asset is the exact usable resource system: source-backed curriculum, workbook, cheat sheet, and Notion companion.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.notes: Tier C is intentional for an exact resource/system asset.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.notes: Desktop and mobile screenshots inspected for the learning path, guide, resource page, and direct download fallback.

checks.name: source-currency
checks.notes: Current official OpenAI sources were used.

checks.name: implementation-gates
checks.notes: Content check, static link check, scoped lint, type check, and CI production build passed.

score.notes: Ship-ready after local visual QA, source review, direct-download verification, and implementation gates.
